uncertainties.read: field-split Schedule A sheet — wide numeric matrix + Transaction-Summary (M&R Trust Partnership)
uncertainties.note: Same 'M&R Trust Partnership' 29-asset slice as pages 103-104. This sheet shows a wide 12-column numeric matrix plus a far-right 3-column Transaction-Summary block (headers degraded ~'P / M / PN'), owner 'SP' for all rows. Block identity (Value grid vs Amount-of-Income matrix) could NOT be distinguished from page 103 at this scan degradation — both render near-identical bucket headers; this may be the companion Value-block slice OR a duplicate of the page-103 Amount slice. Per-cell marks are NULLED as unresolvable. Asset names adopted from the clearer companion Type-of-Income sheet (page 104). Downstream: dedup/merge by asset name across pages 103/104/105 for this trust.
Asset-name column at the legibility floor on this page; names taken from page 104. GS/Societe Generale structured-note due dates uncertain.
